name: Max Roach
description: American jazz percussionist, drummer, and composer (1924–2007)
abstract: Maxwell Lemuel Roach (January 10, 1924 – August 16, 2007) was an American jazz drummer and composer. A pioneer of bebop, he worked in many other styles of music, and is generally considered one of the most important drummers in history.

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Davis
about_quotes.evidence: Clifford Brown, Max Roach, it’s either Harold Land or © Fillius Jazz Archive -8- Sonny Rollins on those records. I wasn’t even really thinking about the trombone so much, just the language.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Davis interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, December 15, 2017

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Jang
about_quotes.evidence: I did a recording in collaboration with Max Roach... I did a project with Max Roach, a collaboration... we came out with this recording 'River of Life'
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Jang interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 17, 2003 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: somebody sent me footage of my mother recently, playing with Max Roach or something like that. And I didn’t know she played with Max Roach.
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Jang
about_quotes.evidence: I was mentored by Max Roach. He was the age of my father. Max Roach was like a father figure.

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Turré
about_quotes.evidence: And when I played with Art Blakey and Max Roach, you know, the same thing
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Turré interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 29, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I had a similar experience a year later at the New Orleans Jazz and Heritage Festival... And who closes out the day, but Max Roach, playing solo drums... It was an honor just to hear them... afterwards, I went up to him and said, “It was such an honor to hear you play.” He turns to me and he says, “
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
